comment: PLACEHOLDER - This file is a placeholder for Firebase configuration.
comment2: Firebase is required for Push Notifications in the mobile app.
instructions: 2. Create a new project or select existing one
3. Add an Android app with package name: com.nilin.app
4. Download the google-services.json file from Firebase console
5. Replace this placeholder file with the downloaded google-services.json
note: Without google-services.json, Firebase/FCM features will not work.
alternative: If you don't need push notifications, you can ignore this file.
build_note: The build.gradle is configured to gracefully handle missing file - push notifications will be disabled.
